name: copilot-agent-monitor
description: Keeps GitHub Copilot Agent always coding — autonomous watchdog with screenshot analysis

copilotMonitor.enabled.description: Start monitor automatically when VS Code opens

copilotMonitor.stallWarnSecs.description: Seconds of inactivity before sending 'continue' (default: 5 min)

copilotMonitor.stallHardSecs.description: Seconds of inactivity before opening a new chat (default: 8 min)

copilotMonitor.screenshotMinIntervalSecs.description: Minimum seconds between screenshot analyses — prevents model abuse (default: 3 min)

copilotMonitor.maxScreenshotsPerHour.description: Hard cap on vision API calls per hour to protect 0x quota

copilotMonitor.loopPromptFile.description: Path to the prompt sent when opening a new chat session

copilotMonitor.modelPool.description: Ordered list of 0x models to rotate when rate-limited (raptor-mini has no vision — not used for screenshots)

copilotMonitor.zeroXModels.description: Model IDs classified as 0x (free tier, GitHub Pro). Source: GitHub docs multiplier table. Partial match: 'gpt-4o' matches 'gpt-4o-2024-11-20'. NOTE: raptor-mini is 0x but has no vision — the brain will never use it for screenshots.

copilotMonitor.visionModel.description: Model used for screenshot analysis. MUST be 0x + vision-capable. Valid choices (GitHub Pro): gpt-4o, gpt-5-mini, gpt-4.1. raptor-mini is NOT valid (no vision). If an invalid model is configured, the brain auto-falls-back to gpt-4o → gpt-5-mini → gpt-4.1.

copilotMonitor.cdpPort.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol port used by the Selector Wizard for live DOM capture. Requires VS Code to be started with --remote-debugging-port=<port>

copilotMonitor.costGuard.maxActionsPerWi.description: Cost Guard: max non-WAIT actions allowed in the sliding window before the circuit breaker trips. Increase if you see false positives.

copilotMonitor.costGuard.windowMinutes.description: Cost Guard: sliding window size in minutes. Actions older than this are not counted.

copilotMonitor.costGuard.autoResetMinute.description: Cost Guard: minutes to wait before the circuit breaker auto-resets. Use 'Copilot Monitor: Reset Cost Guard' to clear manually.
